headline: MSCI Buys PM Insights To Deepen Private Markets Data And Analytics
summary: MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) has agreed to acquire PM Insights to expand its private markets data and analytics capabilities. The deal adds PM Insights' daily secondary market data and analytics for private assets to MSCI's existing product set. The acquisition is intended to support private market investors with more detailed transparency and decision-support tools. For investors watching private assets, MSCI sits at the intersection of indices, data, and analytics used across global portfolios. As...

headline: Private Markets’ Software Pain Is About to Get a Lot Worse
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The software problem roiling private markets is about to face a big new test. A wall of debt maturities is looming for the industry just as artificial intelligence threatens to upend entire businesses in what’s been dubbed the SaaSpocalypse.More than $330 billion of high yield, leveraged loan and business development company-linked software and technology debt is coming due for repayment through 2028, a chunk of it tied to firms owned by private markets.
